items.name: Sanjay Aggarwal
items.title: Principal at Massive Capital
bio: 8+ years as active investor across asset classes (Land/SFR/Commercial/Multifamily)
Co-Sponsored 1000+ units across Texas with exit of 800+ units
10+ Years in Fortune 50 Companies (Capital One/Barclays) with numerous leadership roles in Portfolio and Strategy and Vendor Relationship
MBA from Booth School of Business (University of Chicago) and Masters in Mechanical Engineering from University of Central Florida

items.name: Shahriar Khan
items.title: Principal at Massive Capital
bio: 4+ years as active investor purchasing over 180+ properties across asset classes (Land/SFR/Commercial/Multifamily)

13+ years in Fortune 10 Company (Royal Dutch Shell) with numerous leadership roles in Corporate Planning, Portfolio Strategy and Business Unit Finance Manager (CFO) looking over $5bn of Portfolio value
MBA from Jones School of Business (Rice University) and Undergraduate in Electrical Engineering from Prairie View A&M University

items.name: Mike Bailey
items.title: Principal at Massive Capital
bio: 20+ years as Active Investor across asset classes (Land/SFR/Commercial/Multifamily)
Co-Sponsored 300+ units across Houston and Dallas market since 2021
30+ years in Fortune 10 Company (Conoco Phillips) with numerous leadership roles in Upstream Engineering managing project across multiple counties, Corporate Capital Strategy and Vendor Relationship
Bachelor of Science in Petroleum Engineering from University of Oklahoma

items.name: Selcuk Alemdar
items.title: Principal at Ephesus Equity Partners
bio: 4+ years passive and active investing over 7 different projects totaling 1460 doors in multifamily and short-term rental industries
23+ years combined in Cement (Italcimenti Group), Construction, Fuel Industries with numerous positions in Management, Marketing and Ownership
Bachelor's Degree in Geology Engineering from Istanbul University, Construction Management Certification from Istanbul Technical University
